reviews.review_description: I’m waiting for the new release on the 10th with bated breath. If you have a copy available to try before release I will be more than happy to test it. I lost over 10 lbs just doing the boot camp.

developer_response.body:
That is awesome.
If you join our discord we will be happy to add you to the beta

reviews.review_description: I love the workouts and even 3 minutes gets my heart going! But it has the 5 and 10 minute options locked. My profile menu says free tier which I assume might be the reason. But I can’t figure out where to find a way to unlock the other options through a payment or subscription or anything. So info on how to resolve that would be awesome!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
The 5 and 10 minute workouts should actually unlock once you did your first 3 minute workout. We will check if there are some situations where it does not unlock.

In the meantime, if you want to check out our new beta to see what's coming contact us at dev@vrworkout.at

reviews.review_description: It is nearly impossible to input information in, the YouTube feature does not even work. Such a horrible design that I can barely customize my workouts and get started. Don’t waste your time

developer_response.body:
Sorry for your bad experience. 
If it's the keyboard, please note that it is attached to the hand you touched the panel with, you enter the keys with the other/free hand.

The latest update to youtube caused some issues. It should be fixed in the new release today.

For support questions please contact us in the discord

reviews.review_description:
need real voices, needs better music.
Has potential and got me moving in a fun way.
not sure why some of the markers look different than others.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback. Most of the markers are currently explained in the tutorial tab in the playlist menu, which is not all that obvious, but we are planning to explain all of them in more detail in the onboarding in the future.
If you have any questions about the workout just hit us up in our discord https://chat.vrworkout.at , we are always looking for feedback that helps improve the experience, and we are doing weekly multiplayer sessions where we walk players through the game during a 10 minute workout. If you want to join us just check the scheduling bot in the discord.

I totally agree on the voices. Once everything has settled we will have a real voice actor speak the instructions.
As for the music, it's pretty hard to compete as a free game with the big ones, especially when it comes to music licensing. That's why most of the players who use it regularly eventually upload their own music. Once the youtube player is fully working the available music will expand to whatever you can play from youtube.

reviews.review_description:
My dog just died after I kicked it in to a train
Also the game is good :)

I have used only the default workouts supplied in the application. It has helped with exercising more regularly. I really appreciate the use of hand gestures. Navigation feels very natural. As you need to have a registered account to save your workouts, I would really love to see a web based workout editor which would allow creation of playlist and customization of exercises to be done which would then be synced with the headset.
Really great workout app. I like this game because of the hand tracking! It's really very fun!

There is so much technology and content packed into this that it is amazing it is free!  You can really get a full body workout with this which is rare for Quest apps.  Always on the cutting edge of the new Oculus technology releases for developers!

Updating to four stars for the added tutorial and quick and useful developer response!

This seems like it may be a great workout app, but it's pretty unintuitive (which is fine) and there's no tutorial (which isn't).  What do the three X symbols in front of a head marker mean?  Who knows.  Why are there two guys doing different things in front of you?  No idea.  Why do seemingly perfect hit on the fit symbols sometimes register and sometimes not?  No way of knowing.
This is a great workout app, but it is nearly impossible to input various thing to login information to setting changes

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We will definitely rework that soon.
Could you let us know if you used to touch the interface directly or the remote touch where you only point towards an object?

reviews.review_description: I love that you can customize your workout and look up music videos through YouTube to play background music. It helps with the motivation of working out and because it uses YouTube so you don't have to pay for the songs you use.

reviews.review_title: Very good usage, just weird input track
reviews.review_description: Awesome app, great to just pick up throw on and get in workouts. I love the multiplayer aspect, and the simplicity of the app. However, if devs could just touch up how we input things in the app? It’s a little difficult to make my account since I can’t see what I’m typing.
I genuinely love this game specifically because of the hand tracking. If I were to accidentally hit a wall or something I wouldn't have to worry about breaking my controllers! Fun game too

reviews.review_title: How have I not written a review yet!!
reviews.review_description:
I can’t say enough about this app. I was an early adopter and I’ve been using this app for over a year. This app is a serious work out if you do it right. The updates are incredible compared to when it first came out. If you’re looking for some health exercises with some intense music to get you pumped this app is for you. 

i’m a big fan of the Oculus’ Workout capabilities and this app puts you to the test. Download this and give it a try trust me you won’t regret it. Prepare to sweat get a headband.

also don’t be too hard on yourself if you suck in the beginning you’ll get better!

Mechanics and variety are pretty good. I definitely worked up a good sweat playing it and hey it’s free so why not?

A couple ways the game could be improved:
  — some UX help. The screens and instructions are all over the place and not that intuitive. There are a lot of good features, they’re just unclear. 
  — show how much total time in songs have been selected 
  — add a training mode to explain the in game mechanics 
  — add song preview before starting workout 

My other comment is that there isn’t much to keep your mind off the workout.  Other fitness apps by comparison are a bit more fun and likely to keep me active longer. This one will likely be a more well rounded and more difficult workout though.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed response. We are happy that it made your sweat.
UX is currently the biggest weak point, we are already working to remedy that. The latest version does have a bit of explanation on the different cue types so hopefully that will make it a bit easier.
As for the fun part. We are coming from the game being a workout first and are slowly working our way towards gamifying the elements, but it will mostly remain a workout machine because there are already so many regular games that have some sort of fitness aspect that we wanted to create an app with slightly more fitness focus

reviews.review_title: Workout wrapped nicely in a game!
reviews.review_description: Check this game out if you want to get a great workout in. Play it without controllers and use your hands so you can do the pushups. Wear a headband to soak up the sweat. Remember to hydrate! Join the discord to chat with the developer, he's super helpful and responsive!

I really enjoyed VRWorkout, it has awesome potential and I’m really excited to see what the final product will look like. Go into this with an open mind and if you have questions the developer is really responsive on discord.
Really great workout app.  It's in my rotation of Quest fitness games.

I think graphics would be worse than this.But if I only exercise, I recommend it
(Replacing library images wouldn't be complicated. I want to change it to something neat

Got a chance to play this awesome game tonight :) Super fun and I def got a good sweat on!! haha 

Only tweaks I found would be helping 
1. when doing crunches adding cross over punches to target your sides 
2. when in squats I feel there would be a more organic flow if the targets were cross body hits instead of same color on same side of body. 
3. the squat triangles, the lowest one was super low I had to miss it haha 
4. the height for the jumps seemed a bit off 

I'm def going to add my own songs to the playlist, get some Falling in Reverse and Ice Nine Kills on there - I did enjoy the rock playlist you guys offered also!! 

Great app guys :) looking forward to my next workout.
